ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The plugin will add image preview within the "Source Mode" of New Editor. In case you have Live Preview enabled, the plugin will automatically detect this and won't render additionally to avoid duplication.
ast.target: 该插件将在新编辑器的“源代码模式”中添加图片预览。 如果你启用了实时预览，插件会自动检测并不会额外渲染，以避免重复。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Syntax Error in Mermaid graph
ast.target: Mermaid 图表语法错误

ast.name: error
ast.source: maximum nesting of 10 spans reached!!!
ast.target: 已达到 10 个 span 的最大嵌套层级！！！

ast.name: log
ast.source: Image in Editor Plugin is loaded
ast.target: 编辑器内图片插件已加载

ast.name: log
ast.source: Image in Editor Plugin is unloaded
ast.target: 编辑器内图片插件已卸载

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn off this option if you want to stop rendering images in the editor source mode. Disabling requires vault reload.
ast.target: 如果你想停止在编辑器源代码模式中渲染图片，请关闭此选项。禁用后需要重载库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on this option if you want Image files (jpeg, jpg, png, gif, svg, bmp, webp) to be rendered in Editor
ast.target: 如果你希望在编辑器中渲染图片文件（jpeg、jpg、png、gif、svg、bmp、webp），请开启此选项

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on this option if you want transclusions to be rendered in Editor. Once this is enabled, you will have custom options for transclusions below.
ast.target: 如果你希望在编辑器中渲染嵌入内容，请开启此选项。启用后，下方将提供嵌入内容的自定义选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on this option if you want also PDF files to be rendered in Editor
ast.target: 如果你也希望在编辑器中渲染 PDF 文件，请开启此选项

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on this option if you want iframes to be rendered in Editor
ast.target: 如果你希望在编辑器中渲染 iframe，请开启此选项

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Turn on this option if you want drawings to be rendered in Editor.
                You need to have "Excalidraw" plugin installed so that this
                option works.
ast.target:
如果你想在编辑器中渲染绘图，请开启此选项。
                你需要安装 "Excalidraw" 插件，
                此选项才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Turn on this option if you want outlook MSG Files to be rendered in Editor. 
                You need to have "MSG Handler" plugin installed so that
                this option works
ast.target:
如果你想在编辑器中渲染 Outlook MSG 文件，请开启此选项。 
                你需要安装 "MSG Handler" 插件，
                此选项才能生效

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on if you want to trigger preview when you hover on internal links within the rendered transclusion
ast.target: 如果你想在渲染的嵌入内容中悬停内部链接时触发预览，请开启

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Render All
ast.target: 渲染全部

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Render Images in Editor
ast.target: 在编辑器中渲染图片

ast.source: Render Transclusion in Editor
ast.target: 在编辑器中渲染嵌入内容

ast.source: Render PDFs in Editor
ast.target: 在编辑器中渲染 PDF

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Render Iframes in Editor
ast.target: 在编辑器中渲染 Iframe

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Render Excalidraw in Editor
ast.target: 在编辑器中渲染 Excalidraw

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Render Outlook MSG Files in Editor
ast.target: 在编辑器中渲染 Outlook MSG 文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Preview on Hover for File Links
ast.target: 文件链接悬停预览

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Copy Image to Clipboard
ast.target: 将图片复制到剪贴板

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tries to smartly fix indentation in es6 strings
ast.target: 尝试智能修复 es6 字符串中的缩进

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Parses simple line breaks as
(GFM Style)
ast.target:
将简单换行解析为
（GFM 风格）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes adding a space between `#` and the header text mandatory (GFM Style)
ast.target: 强制在 `#` 与标题文本之间添加空格（GFM 风格）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables github @mentions
ast.target: 启用 github @mentions

ast.name: description
ast.source: Changes the link generated by @mentions. Only applies if ghMentions option is enabled.
ast.target: 更改由 @mentions 生成的链接。仅在启用 ghMentions 选项时生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Encode e-mail addresses through the use of Character Entities, transforming ASCII e-mail addresses into its equivalent decimal entities
ast.target: 使用字符实体对电子邮件地址进行编码，将 ASCII 电子邮件地址转换为等效的十进制实体

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open all links in new windows
ast.target: 在新窗口中打开所有链接

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Support for HTML Tag escaping. ex:
foo
ast.target:
支持 HTML 标签转义。例如：
foo

ast.name: description
ast.source: Outputs a complete html document, including `<html>`, `<head>` and `<body>` tags
ast.target: 输出完整的 html 文档，包括 `<html>`、`<head>` 和 `<body>` 标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable support for document metadata (defined at the top of the document between `«««` and `»»»` or between `---` and `---`).
ast.target: 启用对文档元数据的支持（定义在文档顶部 `«««` 与 `»»»` 之间或 `---` 与 `---` 之间）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Split adjacent blockquote blocks
ast.target: 拆分相邻的块引用区块

ast.source: Toggle Render All (Requires reload of vault)
ast.target: 切换渲染全部（需要重新加载库）
